'''''UFC 319: du Plessis vs. Chimaev''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on August 16, 2025, at the [[United Center]] in [[Chicago, Illinois]], United States.<ref name="Chicago">{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2025/5/13/24429684/dricus-du-plessis-defends-middleweight-title-against-khamzat-chimaev-at-ufc-319-in-chicago|title=Dricus du Plessis defends middleweight title against Khamzat Chimaev at UFC 319 in Chicago|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Jed Meshew|date=2025-05-13|access-date=2025-05-13}}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's eighth visit to Chicago and first since [[UFC 238]] in June 2019.<ref name="Chicago"/>

A [[UFC Middleweight Championship]] bout between current champion (also former [[Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki#Welterweight championship|KSW Welterweight Champion]]) [[Dricus du Plessis]] and undefeated contender [[Khamzat Chimaev]] headlined the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.cbssports.com/mma/news/ufc-319-fight-card-dricus-du-plessis-to-defend-title-against-khamzat-chimaev-in-chicago-in-august/|title=UFC 319 fight card: Dricus du Plessis to defend title against Khamzat Chimaev in Chicago in August|publisher=cbssports.com|author=Shakiel Mahjouri|date=2025-05-13|access-date=2025-05-13}}</ref> [[Nassourdine Imavov]] was expected to serve as backup and potential replacement for this fight, but he announced a month later that it would not be the case anymore as he was angling for a fight against [[Caio Borralho]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/05/14/ufc-319-dricus-du-plessis-vs-khamzat-chimaev-official-backup-imavov/83621199007/|title=Nassourdine Imavov named official backup for Du Plessis vs. Chimaev at UFC 319|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Farah Hannoun|date=2025-05-14|access-date=2025-05-14}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/06/17/ufc-319-nassourdine-imavov-no-longer-backup-shouts-top-10-opponent/84251830007/|title=Nassourdine Imavov abandons UFC 319 backup role, turns attention to Caio Borralho|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Matthew Wells|date=2025-06-17|access-date=2025-06-18}}</ref> In turn, Borralho announced that he would be the new backup for the main event. He and Imavov are still scheduled to headline [[UFC Fight Night: Imavov vs. Borralho]] three weeks later.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2025/7/28/24476034/caio-borralho-says-dricus-du-plessis-vs-khamzat-chimaev-main-event-at-ufc-319|title=Caio Borralho says he's the backup fighter for Dricus Du Plessis vs. Khamzat Chimaev main event at UFC 319|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Guilherme Cruz|date=2025-07-28|access-date=2025-07-28}}</ref>

A welterweight bout between [[Geoff Neal]] and [[Carlos Prates]] took place at this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url= https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/07/13/ufc-319-chicago-fight-card-geoff-neal-vs-carlos-prates/84437777007/ |title= UFC 319 adds Geoff Neal vs. Carlos Prates to Chicago|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-07-13|access-date=2025-07-13}}</ref> They were originally scheduled to meet at [[UFC 314]] in April, but Neal had to withdraw from the fight due to an injury.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.si.com/fannation/mma/news/ufc-314-main-card-cancellation|title=UFC 314 hit by huge main card cancellation|publisher=si.com|author=Mathew Riddle|date=2025-03-29|access-date=2025-03-29}}</ref>

A women's flyweight bout between [[Karine Silva]] and [[JJ Aldrich]] was scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Card numerado! Ultimate encaminha Karine Killer vs JJ Aldrich para o UFC 319, em agosto|url=https://agfight.com/ufc/card-numerado-ultimate-encaminha-karine-killer-vs-jj-aldrich-para-o-ufc-319-em-agosto/|date=2025-05-28|access-date=2025-05-28|publisher=agfight.com|author=Gaspar Bruno}} {{in lang|pt-br}}</ref> However, Aldrich withdrew from the fight for undisclosed reasons and was replaced by Dione Barbosa.<ref name="Barbosa">{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2025/7/30/24477479/karine-silva-rematch-dione-barbosa-jj-aldrich-ufc-319|title=Karine Silva gets new opponent after JJ Aldrich withdraws from UFC 319 fight|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Damon Martin|date=2025-07-30|access-date=2025-07-31}}</ref>

The flyweight final of [[The Ultimate Fighter: Team Cormier vs. Team Sonnen]] took place at this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.sportsnet.ca/ufc/article/the-ultimate-fighter-33-finale-bouts-added-to-ufc-319-preliminary-card|title=The Ultimate Fighter 33 finale bouts added to UFC 319 preliminary card|publisher=sportsnet.ca|author=Staff|date=2025-08-12|access-date=2025-08-13}}</ref> The welterweight final between Rodrigo Sezinando and Daniil Donchenko was scheduled for the event but was moved to [[UFC Fight Night: Lopes vs. Silva]] one month later due to an injury suffered from Sezinando's side.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/08/14/ufc-319-tuf-33-final-donchenko-vs-sezinando-canceled/85656246007|title=Injury scraps Daniil Donchenko vs. Rodrigo Sezinando 'TUF 33' final at UFC 319|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Farah Hannoun and Nolan King|date=2025-08-14|access-date=2025-08-14}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmanews.com/news/ufc/rodrigo-sezinando-injured-tuf-welterweight-finale-moved-from-ufc-319-to-noche-ufc-3/|title=Rodrigo Sezinando Injured, TUF Welterweight Finale Moved From UFC 319 To Noche UFC 3|publisher=sports.yahoo.com|author=Thomas Albano|date=2025-08-14|access-date=2025-08-15}}</ref>

[[King Green]] and [[Carlos Diego Ferreira]] were expected to meet in a lightweight bout on the preliminary card.<ref>{{Cite web|title=King Green vs. Diego Ferreira booked for UFC 319 in Chicago|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/06/17/ufc-319-king-green-diego-ferreira-booked-chicago/84245408007/|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Staff|date=2025-06-17|access-date=2025-08-14}}</ref> However, Green suffered an undisclosed injury during fight week and the pairing was scrapped.<ref>{{Cite web|author=Mike Heck|date=2025-08-14|title=Injury scratches King Green vs. Diego Ferreira bout from UFC 319 lineup|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/ufc/398960/injury-scratches-king-green-vs-diego-ferreira-bout-from-ufc-319-lineup|access-date=2025-08-14|publisher=mmafighting.com}}</ref>

At the weigh-ins, [[The Return of The Ultimate Fighter: Team Volkanovski vs. Team Ortega]] middleweight tournament winner [[Bryan Battle]] weighed in at 190 pounds, four pounds over the middleweight non-title fight limit. His bout with [[Nursulton Ruziboev]] was scheduled to proceed at catchweight, however shortly thereafter, it was announced that the bout had been cancelled and Battle was released from the UFC.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/08/15/ufc-319-bryan-battle-vs-nursulton-ruziboev-canceled/85677842007/|title=UFC 319 loses yet another fight on eve of event|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-08-16|access-date=2025-08-16}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/ufc/399114/ufc-319-weigh-in-results-dricus-du-plessis-khamzat-chimaev-on-for-title-clash-fighter-misses-by-4-pounds|title=UFC 319 weigh-in results: Dricus du Plessis, Khamzat Chimaev on for title clash, fighter misses by 4 pounds|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2025-08-16|access-date=2025-08-16}}</ref>

==Bonus awards==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{Cite web|date=2025-08-17|title=Elbow Bros! Prates, Murphy earn $50K bonuses for back-to-back spinning knockouts|url=https://www.mmamania.com/ufc-319-du-plessis-vs-chimaev-start-time-full-results-espn-mma/383056/prates-murphy-earn-50k-bonuses-for-back-to-back-spinning-knockouts-ufc-319-chimaev-elliott|access-date=2025-08-17|publisher=mmamania.com|author=Dan Hiergesell}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night:''' No bonus awarded.
*'''Performance of the Night: Khamzat Chimaev''', '''Lerone Murphy''', '''Carlos Prates''', and '''Tim Elliott'''
